message:
test: comprehensive gap-filling unit tests and test infrastructure

Add 35 new unit tests across 6 modules (config, errors, ewma, pid,
fs_stats, special_locations) and cross-cutting test infrastructure
(MockPlatform, TestEnvironment, SyntheticTimeSeries) in tests/common.

Closes bd-7ls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
